Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

6 
ADMSN_DT 
LABEL: 
Date beneficiary admitted for Inpatient care or date care started 
DESCRIPTION: The date on which the beneficiary was admitted for Inpatient care or the date that care started. 
SHORT NAME: ADMSNDT 
LONG NAME: ADMSN_DT 
TYPE: 
DATE 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This field is derived from the admission date that is present on the first claim record included in
